nasb.text: Indeed, none of those who wait for You will be ashamed; Those who deal treacherously without cause will be ashamed.

esv.text: Indeed, none who wait for you shall be put to shame; they shall be ashamed who are wantonly treacherous.

cnv.text: 等候你的必不羞愧， 但那些無故以詭詐待人的必要羞愧。

ccb.text: 信靠你的必不羞愧， 背信弃义者必蒙羞。

csbs.text: 所有等候你的必不致蒙羞， 那些无故背信的必会蒙羞。
